div1.entryFree:
Forfeit, partic. adj. 1) liable to penal seizure; lost by breach of laws or conditions: all the souls that were were f. once, Meas. II, 2, 73. still f. in the same kind, III, 2, 206. our states are f. LLL V, 2, 425. stand f. LLL V, 2, 425 my bond to the Jew is f. Merch. III, 2, 319. this bond is f. IV, 1, 230. With to: thy wealth being f. to the state, Merch. IV, 1, 365.
2) subject, due: f. to a confined doom, Sonn. 107, 4. his brains are f. to the next tile that falls, All's IV, 3, 216.
